claim_boundary: This portfolio assigns product roles and research allocation for one repository state. It does not prove AGI, reliable autonomous execution, multimodal capability, revenue, retention, or valuation.

commercial_families.name: Archie
commercial_families.thesis: One human-power system. Founder begins the human turn, Archie owns the objective and intelligence, Maker creates authorized consequence, and Foundry lets humans govern aggressive capability research. These are distinct surfaces, not separate companies.

routes.name: Founder human invention surface
routes.use_when: A biological human has one unfinished, messy, compressed, or ambitious intention and wants development power without developer literacy.

routes.name: Founder direct route
routes.use_when: A person wants to open a possibility field, preserve alternatives, and explicitly push one branch into reality.

routes.name: Archie intelligence surface
routes.use_when: The objective requires independent world modelling, unfamiliar-domain research, capability invention, continuity, and whole-turn coordination.

routes.name: Maker execution surface
routes.use_when: A selected branch must become a real artifact, mutation, deployment, communication, or other permissioned consequence with verification and rollback.

routes.name: Foundry human research cockpit
routes.use_when: A human wants to allocate token and compute subsidy, launch speculative capability campaigns, inspect candidates and evidence, and admit or reject a stronger release without becoming an ML engineer.

routes.name: Frontier World Expo research preview
routes.use_when: Researchers need contradictory forms, lived multimodal commissions, raw evidence requirements, and a promotion frontier that resists familiar software convergence.

routes.name: Replaceable website output
routes.use_when: A visitor wants an actual unrelated website artifact demonstrating that ordinary programs are outputs rather than system organs.

founder.product_identity: the easiest human invention surface for beginning one whole Archie turn
founder.job_to_be_done: Accept the person in their own language, open materially different possibilities, and let them push one whole objective without managing tools, tickets, agents, or Git.
founder.current_truth: A local decision surface exists, but it still needs to be replaced by the one-intention human-power experience and connected to admitted Archie and Maker execution before it can claim autonomous creation.
promotion_gates: no manual Git or ticket workflow

archie.product_identity: attempted general intelligence responsible for a whole human objective
archie.job_to_be_done: Construct an independent world model, research unfamiliar domains, invent missing faculties, coordinate programs, and remain responsible for the intended end state until verified delivery.
archie.current_truth: The repository has runtime, workspace, derivation, evaluation, admission, launch-frontier, and distillation substrates. It does not yet contain an independently admitted generally capable model and must not claim AGI from architecture or interface work.

maker.product_identity: mostly invisible permissioned consequence, verification, and delivery engine
maker.job_to_be_done: At the push boundary, collapse one selected branch into real action under exact authority, resource, evidence, reversibility, and delivery constraints.
maker.current_truth: The repository has substantial lease, workspace, tool, verification, rollback, and delivery contracts, but open runtime-composition defects and absent admitted intelligence block a broad autonomous reliability claim.

foundry.product_identity: human-operated training and speculative capability-research cockpit
foundry.job_to_be_done: Let humans launch aggressively subsidized speculative research, inspect provenance and negative evidence, compare contradictory candidates, and admit stronger signed intelligence releases without requiring full ML infrastructure expertise.
foundry.current_truth: The repository has deterministic campaign allocation, candidate packaging, evaluation, distillation, and admission substrates, but it does not yet expose a complete human research cockpit or prove that its candidate pipeline produces generally stronger intelligence.

expo.product_identity: independent multimodal capability exposition and anti-convergence tournament
expo.job_to_be_done: Translate frontier capability into lived visual, sonic, speech, and persistent-world commissions, retain raw evidence, and select non-dominated embodiments.
expo.current_truth: The repository has a deterministic campaign kernel, twelve commission definitions, six contradictory candidate strata, a fail-closed evidence envelope, and an authored research surface; no candidate has completed its commission or earned promotion.
promotion_gates: blinded human preference and authorship evidence

sample-site.product_identity: one replaceable ordinary website output unrelated to model training or system memory
sample-site.job_to_be_done: Demonstrate that the system may produce a real finished website whose subject and form are unrelated to the AI architecture.
sample-site.current_truth: The repository will publish one deliberately ordinary unrelated site example; it is evidence only of that exact authored artifact, not autonomous generation or general intelligence.

retirements.assumption: Sideways is a commercial family or privileged consumer identity for the intelligence system.
retirements.replacement: The former implementation is historical sample material only; ordinary programs are replaceable outputs and receive no architectural privilege.

retirements.assumption: Founder is an internal product tournament for developers.
retirements.replacement: Founder is the public human invention surface for people who do not want or know how to operate development machinery.

retirements.assumption: Foundry is a robot self-administration subsystem.
retirements.replacement: Foundry is a human-operated training and research cockpit with aggressive token and compute subsidy, explicit evidence, and governed release admission.

retirements.assumption: GitHub, tickets, branches, and developer dashboards are the user workflow.
retirements.replacement: They are optional substrates beneath Maker and disappear from normal human use.

retirements.assumption: A polished shell or large speculative run proves capability.
retirements.replacement: Exploration may be massive; promotion and claims remain fail-closed on exact independent evidence.

market_anchors.observed_anchor: Individual and team buyers pay for amplified software-development power, supporting Archie and Maker pricing hypotheses.
Self-serve and team pricing establish willingness to pay for autonomous execution and compute-backed work.
Broad non-developer audiences pay for accessible creation and agent surfaces inside ordinary work.
Serious capability research can consume substantial token and compute budgets; Foundry pricing must separate governance value from compute subsidy or pass-through.
